nodes.name: error_metrics.rs
nodes.summary: Defines ErrorMetrics and ErrorMetricsRef for tracking per-component error counters, exposed via Prometheus for alerting on runtime errors.

nodes.name: gauge_ext.rs
nodes.summary: Extension trait adding RAII guard semantics to Prometheus gauge metrics, automatically decrementing on drop for tracking in-flight operations.

nodes.name: guarded_metrics.rs
nodes.summary: Implements guarded Prometheus metric wrappers that track active label sets and warn when cardinality explodes or labels are leaked.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for risingwave_common_metrics; re-exports error metrics, gauge extensions, guarded metrics, monitor utilities, and relabeled metric wrappers.

nodes.name: metrics.rs
nodes.summary: Provides a global Prometheus registry and shared metric registration utilities used across all RisingWave crates.

nodes.name: connection.rs
nodes.summary: Implements connection-level metrics instrumentation using tower middleware, tracking active connections, latency, and bytes transferred per gRPC endpoint.

nodes.name: in_mem.rs
nodes.summary: Provides an in-memory Prometheus registry snapshot implementation for testing metric collection without a live Prometheus endpoint.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Barrel module aggregating all runtime monitoring utilities: connection metrics, in-memory registry, process metrics, and RwLock instrumentation.

nodes.name: process.rs
nodes.summary: Implements process-level Prometheus metrics collection: CPU usage, memory usage, file descriptors, and thread counts for the RisingWave process.

nodes.name: rwlock.rs
nodes.summary: Provides a metrics-instrumented RwLock wrapper that tracks lock contention and acquisition latency via Prometheus histograms.

nodes.name: relabeled_metric.rs
nodes.summary: Implements relabeled metric wrappers that dynamically add or override label values on existing Prometheus metrics without creating new metric families.
